title: centaurea × leptocephala
intro: Centaurea × leptocephala, also known as Perky Sue, is a hybrid perennial flower that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving pain, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Centaurea × leptocephala include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × leptocephala can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
